name: Summer Vegetable Bowl
recipeIngredient: 6 ears of corn, cut into 1/3 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation and cooking: 1 hour
.
1. In a 6-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, fry the bacon until crisp. Drain on paper towels.
2. Add the onions and green pepper to the drippings in the Dutch oven. Cook until golden brown.
3. Add hot water and the salt, sugar, and white pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add the zucchini and celery; cover and cook for an additional 8 to 10 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
6. Using a slotted spoon, arrange the vegetables on a large platter or in a large shallow bowl. Crumble the bacon over the top and sprinkle with seasoning.
7. Arrange the tomato wedges on top.
